name: Chat: ask about code
desc: Cursor Cmd+L: ask the AI about your code in a chat panel

name: Chat: selection context
desc: Include the current selection as code context

name: Chat: @file context
desc: Reference a file (@file) as chat context

name: Chat: @symbol context
desc: Reference a symbol/definition (@symbol) as context

name: Chat: @codebase
desc: Codebase-aware answers via indexing/retrieval

name: Chat: @web
desc: Answer using a web search

name: Chat: apply code block
desc: Apply a code block from the answer into the buffer

name: Chat: conversation threads
desc: Persistent multi-turn conversation history

name: Chat: model picker
desc: Choose the model/provider for a request

name: Inline edit
desc: Cursor Cmd+K: edit the selection from a natural-language prompt

name: Inline generate
desc: Generate code from a prompt with no selection

name: Inline edit diff preview
desc: Preview the AI edit as a diff before applying

name: Inline edit accept/reject
desc: Accept or reject the proposed edit

name: Inline edit follow-up
desc: Iterate on the edit with another instruction

name: Terminal Cmd+K
desc: Generate a shell command from a prompt in the terminal

name: Agent: multi-file edits
desc: Composer/Agent: autonomous edits across multiple files

name: Agent: read files
desc: Agent tool to read files/codebase

name: Agent: write files
desc: Agent tool to create/edit files

name: Agent: run commands
desc: Agent tool to run terminal commands

name: Agent: review & apply
desc: Review and accept/reject each proposed change

name: Agent: plan / todos
desc: Produce and track a plan/todo list

name: Agent: checkpoints
desc: Checkpoint and restore the workspace between steps

name: Agent: auto-run mode
desc: Run tools without per-step confirmation (YOLO)

name: Tab autocomplete
desc: Multi-line AI autocompletion as you type

name: Predict next edit
desc: Predict and jump to the next edit location

name: Partial accept
desc: Accept a completion word-by-word

name: AI commit message
desc: Generate a git commit message from the diff

name: Project rules (.cursorrules)
desc: Per-project AI rules/system prompt

name: Custom @docs
desc: Index and reference custom documentation

name: Explain code
desc: Explain the selected code

name: Fix error / lint
desc: AI quick-fix for a diagnostic

name: Generate tests
desc: Generate tests for the selection/file

name: Privacy mode
desc: Run without sending code to training/storage
